Home: This is the website of BokajW. Its primary function is to establish a link from my work, ideas, and creative processes to the public. By forming this link, I aim to cultivate and maintain a habit of steady intellectual and creative output.
Weblog: This is a weekly publication, displaying my attempt at consistency. Posts can include a bit of everything as subjects differ from week to week, and my headspace moves from one place to another.
Philosophy: Reflections and thoughts on particular subjects and events. Updated as my thoughts or understanding expand, and often exploring subjects I find especially important or interesting.
Materiality: Projects of design and architecture, and thoughts on objects and their relation to humanity and everyday life.
Status: Updates on consumption and other metrics I produce.
